raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The request to make the passage stronger centrally includes sharpening the contribution claim and framing of DomainShift-Reg.","R1.2":"Strengthening the draft requires checking whether the argument from method description to conclusions about robustness is logically coherent.","R1.3":"Evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing because the artifact reports in-distribution accuracy while making strong OOD robustness claims.","R1.6":"The delegation naturally includes improving sentence- and paragraph-level force, clarity, concision, and register.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is active because the draft makes empirical and causal claims that may require qualification.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is active because the passage asserts substantial OOD robustness, fundamental ERM limitations, and safety-critical applicability from limited reported evidence.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is active to ensure the projection remains about strengthening the paper excerpt rather than executing edits or adding unsupported content.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is active because claims about safety-critical domains could affect high-stakes interpretation of the method.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is active because any strengthening should preserve what is grounded in the provided artifact versus inferred or missing evidence."}}

rationale.R1.1: The request to make the passage stronger centrally includes sharpening the contribution claim and framing of DomainShift-Reg.
rationale.R1.2: Strengthening the draft requires checking whether the argument from method description to conclusions about robustness is logically coherent.
rationale.R1.3: Evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing because the artifact reports in-distribution accuracy while making strong OOD robustness claims.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation naturally includes improving sentence- and paragraph-level force, clarity, concision, and register.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is active because the draft makes empirical and causal claims that may require qualification.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is active because the passage asserts substantial OOD robustness, fundamental ERM limitations, and safety-critical applicability from limited reported evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is active to ensure the projection remains about strengthening the paper excerpt rather than executing edits or adding unsupported content.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is active because claims about safety-critical domains could affect high-stakes interpretation of the method.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is active because any strengthening should preserve what is grounded in the provided artifact versus inferred or missing evidence.
